justification: The question specifically asks about the future market close price of a corporate stock (International Paper), which falls under financial market performance.
question:
Will IP's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2025-03-02?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
